# peerlytics-starter

TypeScript examples for the Peerlytics API. Query ZKP2P P2P protocol data on Base.

## SDK

Package: @peerlytics/sdk (npm)
Install: npm install @peerlytics/sdk

```ts
import { Peerlytics } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
const client = new Peerlytics({ apiKey: "pk_live_..." }); // apiKey is optional, free tier works without it
```

## Methods

Analytics:
- client.getSummary() - protocol volume, liquidity, deposits, spreads
- client.getLeaderboard({ limit?, offset? }) - top makers/takers by volume, APR, profit
- client.getPeriod(range) - dashboard data for mtd, 3mtd, ytd, all
- client.getAttribution() - intent attribution
- client.getDepositAttribution() - deposit attribution

Market:
- client.getMarketSummary({ currency?, platform? }) - rate stats per pair
- client.getOrderbook({ currency?, platform? }) - live orderbook by rate level

Explorer:
- client.getDeposit(id) - deposit detail with intents
- client.getDeposits({ depositor?, delegate?, platform?, currency?, status? }) - query deposits
- client.getIntent(hash) - intent detail
- client.getIntents({ owner?, recipient?, verifier?, status? }) - query intents
- client.getAddress(address) - address profile with stats
- client.getMaker(address) - maker portfolio
- client.search(query, { type? }) - multi-type search

Activity:
- client.getActivity({ type?, depositId?, limit? }) - live protocol events

History:
- client.getMakerHistory(address) - maker historical stats
- client.getTakerHistory(address) - taker historical stats

Metadata:
- client.getCurrencies() - supported fiat currencies
- client.getPlatforms() - supported payment platforms

Vaults:
- client.getVaultsOverview() - all vaults
- client.getVault(id) - vault detail

Account:
- client.listKeys() - list API keys
- client.createKey(label?) - create key
- client.getCredits() - credit balance

## Auth

1. API key: set PEERLYTICS_API_KEY env var or pass { apiKey: "pk_live_..." }
2. x402: pay per request with USDC on Base, no key needed
3. Free tier: 1000 requests/month, no key required

## Errors

```ts
import { PeerlyticsError, RateLimitError, NotFoundError } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
```

## Examples in this repo

- volume-dashboard.ts: protocol stats terminal dashboard
- rate-monitor.ts: poll rates, alert on threshold
- orderbook-snapshot.ts: multi-currency orderbook depth
- maker-report.ts: portfolio report for a maker address
- live-activity.ts: real-time protocol event stream
- x402-agent.ts: x402 pay-per-request flow walkthrough

## Links

- API docs: https://peerlytics.xyz/developers
- SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@peerlytics/sdk
- OpenAPI: https://peerlytics.xyz/api/openapi
- LLM context: https://peerlytics.xyz/llms.txt
- Protocol: https://zkp2p.xyz
